programme.title: Documentary
programme.desc: BBC Earth provides premium natural history documentaries showcasing wildlife, oceans, and extreme environments across the planet. The channel features high-quality BBC factual programming exploring science, nature, and Earth’s ecosystems. It delivers immersive storytelling focused on the beauty and power of the natural world.
